calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Defendant/Appellant The Floor Store, Inc. appeared, represented by Shanna Dacanay, manager, sworn and testified on their own behalf.

Plaintiffs/Respondents Samuel Tyler Stern and Danielle Elizabeth Laroy appeared, sworn and testified.

Witnesses, Bernard McCormick and George Leonard, sworn and testified on behalf of Defendant/Appellant The Floor Store, Inc.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.

Matter is ruled in open court.

No exhibits retained.
Judge: Carolyn Gold, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2025 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Continued To Feb-20-25 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
